meaning: n.巫婆,女巫,迷人的女子vt.施巫术,迷惑
examples: The prince was turned into a frog by the witch.
The witch foretold that she would marry a prince.
The film is a spinoff from the TV series "Sabrina The Teenage Witch."
Witch House itself is also an excellent example of 17th Century architecture in America.
We even just had a lady get married up there, and she was a witch.
